case_title: SANDY, SAMA I. et al VS SANTOS, FERNANDO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SANTOS, FERNANDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SANDY, SAMA I. REPOLLO, CHARITA B. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SANTOS, FERNANDO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SANDY, SAMA I. REPOLLO, CHARITA B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF REPOLLO, CHARITA B.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SANTOS, FERNANDO TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT SANDY, SAMA I. REPOLLO, CHARITA B. *ON THE CROSS-CLAIM OF FERNANDO SANTOS; JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF FERNANDO SANTOS AND AGAINST SAMA I. SANDY IN THE AMOUNT OF $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00. (SEE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL #28406)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY SANDY, SAMA I. REPOLLO, CHARITA B. AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, FERNANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDY, SAMA I. REPOLLO, CHARITA B. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANTOS, FERNANDO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT INSISTED ON FILING AN APPEAL. COPIES OF APPEAL MAILED TO PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT SANTOS, FERNANDO RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SANDY, SAMA I. $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00, JUDGMENT ON CROSS-CLAIM IS ONLY AS TO SAMA I. SANDY NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
